items.title: Hollander POTD George McCloud. Florida St SF was drafted 7th in 89 by IND. Struggled in IND & was out of NBA by 93 but got back as 3-point guy for DAL. 91-92 was an odd year: (a) sprained ankle while on the phone & sitting and (b) got into epic brawl where John Battle used a 2x4.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD George McCloud. Florida St SF was drafted 7th in 89 by IND. Struggled in IND & was out of NBA by 93 but got back as 3-point guy for DAL. 91-92 was an odd year: (a) sprained ankle while on the phone & sitting and (b) got into epic brawl where John Battle used a 2x4.

items.title: When Payton Pritchard signed his last deal, he chose peace of mind over playing out his contract.
items.author: Bobby Krivitsky
items.body_excerpt:
When Payton Pritchard signed his last deal, he chose peace of mind over playing out his contract.

On Oct. 1, the former 6MOY, who's on one of the NBA's most team-friendly deals, becomes extension-eligible.

I looked into that and the case for the Celtics starting him at PG.

items.title: 2021-22 NBA season
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
2021-22 NBA season
Knicks had:

PG Kemba Walker
SG Evan Fournier
SF Cam Reddish
SF RJ Barrett
PF Julius Randle

Jalen Brunson signed in '22 offseason, Walker traded to shadow realm

Fournier, Reddish, Barrett, Randle in trades that helped bring back Bridges, Hart, Anunoby, Towns

items.title: Just an outstanding @thestar.com interview with Canada’s ambassador to the U.S. when George W. Bush was president. Frank McKenna absolutely nails the Page Six guy.
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
Just an outstanding @thestar.com interview with Canada’s ambassador to the U.S. when George W. Bush was president. Frank McKenna absolutely nails the Page Six guy. 

A sobering reminder of what is so clear from those on the outside in an increasingly global world.

www.thestar.com/opinion/cont...

items.title: New: Reviewing Paul George’s second season with the Sixers, a wildly mixed bag.
items.author: Adam Aaronson
items.body_excerpt:
New: Reviewing Paul George’s second season with the Sixers, a wildly mixed bag.

After returning from suspension, George finally proved capable of submitting star-level scoring nights. But the playoffs exposed the major flaw which remains in his shot diet:
www.phillyvoice.com/sixers-news-...
